codeReview.evidence: Code review rerun approved recursive unsafe-field scrubbing, pure-LOC split, remove-ai-slops coverage, RED transcript evidence, and no scenario-id or expected-label branching.

manualQa.evidence: Manual QA rerun passed direct domain and MCP surfaces for all eight semireal workflow scenarios, stripped-support safe fallback, unsafe-field absence, and MCP tool order count 25.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: uv run python direct evaluate_claim_domain_decision and MCP invoke_tool boundary probe
compare stripped-support fallback JSON across eight scenarios
git commit and git push origin master

adversarialCases.scenario: Nested support signals contain raw/contact/filing/path/balance keys below workflow_signals, signals, review_items, and hold_items.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Workflow judgment review_items recursively remove unsafe keys while preserving safe structured markers.

adversarialCases.scenario: All top-level structured support fields and nested workflow_support are removed from eight semireal payloads.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Decision remains advisory-only, human-review gated, and unsafe fields absent.

artifactRefs.description: Manual QA rerun report for direct domain, MCP, stripped support, and tool order surfaces.
Structured fallback QA result for stripped support scenarios.

gateReview.evidence: Gate rerun approved code and evidence side; only commit and push remained, which subsequently succeeded.

rerunCommands: domain and MCP boundary pytest 8 passed
direct QA approved scenarios 8 surfaces domain and MCP
iteration.evidence: All structural-depth caveat-hardening gates passed and origin/master was updated.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Improve the recorded structural-depth caveats before push while preserving advisory-only, no deploy, no admin/write, no PII, and no authoritative-balance guardrails.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Nested workflow_support preserves exact direct and MCP workflow semantics, stripped support fails safe, reviewer blockers are fixed, and the result is pushed to origin/master.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: C001 nested support boundary passed, C002 stripped-support fallback passed, and C003 regression/review/commit/push passed with origin/master updated.
